visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The animation begins in a quiet suburban neighborhood at night. A boy with gray hair and a red shirt waves goodbye to a bald boy who is seen from behind. They stand on a sidewalk in front of a house with visible windows and a grey exterior. The lighting is flat and representative of night with artificial light sources. (2) The gray-haired boy walks away down the street. He turns his head back, showing a friendly smile and wide eyes, and waves again. The bald boy remains stationary, his expression changing from a neutral gaze to a stunned, wide-eyed look. The background features fences and rooftops typical of a residential area. (3) The scene shifts to a darker, more intimate setting, possibly the bald boy's room. He holds a blue smartphone close to his face. The screen displays a messaging app with bubbles of text. His facial expressions are highly exaggerated, with twitching eyebrows and sweating, indicating intense internal anxiety or excitement. (4) A large close-up of the phone screen shows a message sent from a senior friend asking for breakfast. The bald boy reacts with comedic despair and rapid movements. Large red text overlays the screen at the end as he finally gives in and replies with a casual confirmation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸明天再來喔. [Subtitle]: 好 掰掰. (2) [Subtitle]: 看著學長離去的背影. (3) [Subtitle]: 他似乎也看到我在看他. (4) [Subtitle]: 路上小心喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 此時, 我的內心突然有一個聲音. (6) [Variety]: 拉補拉補. (7) [Subtitle]: 什麼 什麼聲音. [Subtitle]: 不可能吧. (8) [Variety]: 好像...有點喜歡?. (9) [Subtitle]: 為什麼會有成就跳出來. [Subtitle]: 成就解鎖. (10) [Slogan]: 學長 明天早上要不要一起吃早餐. (11) [Subtitle]: 不 不可以. [Subtitle]: 人家又不喜歡男生. [Subtitle]: 我這樣陷下去的話. [Subtitle]: 只會是異男忘而已. [Subtitle]: 哼 不行. [Subtitle]: 阿啾 你是成熟的大人了. [Subtitle]: 如果開始有這種感覺. [Subtitle]: 就要及時煞車. (12) [Slogan]: 好丫. (13) [Variety]: 異男忘.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald male character wearing a black shirt, frequently showing exaggerated emotional expressions.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with a night-time residential street with fences and houses; transitions to a dark indoor setting and stylized graphical backgrounds for internal monologue.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a light, upbeat instrumental background music. A male voice speaks in a friendly, high-arousal tone saying 'Hey, come back tomorrow,' followed by another male voice replying 'Okay, bye-bye' with a calm, conversational pitch. There are no ambient noises, just clean studio-recorded dialogue over the music. (2) As the gray-haired boy turns back, he says 'Be careful on the road' in a warm, melodic tone. Suddenly, a rhythmic heartbeat SFX triggers, followed by a whoosh transition sound. The bald boy's inner monologue begins, delivered in a panicked, high-pitched, and very fast speech rate, indicating shock. (3) A digital 'ding' or pop SFX occurs when a text notification appears on the phone. The BGM shifts slightly in intensity. The bald boy's voice becomes more strained and dramatic as he shouts 'Why is an achievement popping up?' with high vocal arousal and frantic pacing. (4) The bald boy enters a rhythmic, repetitive vocal cycle, debating with himself in a comedic manner. His speech rate is extremely high. Finally, a phone 'send' notification SFX plays. The audio abruptly switches to a dramatic, high-volume Taiwanese pop ballad featuring a male singer with high vocal tension.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic animation depicting a boy's internal struggle and ultimate failure to resist his feelings for a male senior, parodying romance tropes and the 'Heterosexual male crush' (異男忘) social media meme.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Uses popular Taiwanese music and slang to create a relatable comedic situation regarding one-sided crushes.
